title: corybas minutus
intro: Corybas minutus, also known as the minute corybas or the greenhood orchid, is a rare and endangered terrestrial orchid native to Australia. This plant has been traditionally used in herbal medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties. The health benefits of Corybas minutus include its ability to aid in wound healing, reduce fever, and alleviate symptoms of digestive issues, such as diarrhea and stomach cramps. In herbal preparations, Corybas minutus can be consumed as a tea or tincture, or applied topically as a poultice to take advantage of its medicinal properties.
